description_long: This chest of drawers features a simple, rectangular design with a natural wood finish, giving it a classic and utilitarian appearance. The front face is flat and unadorned, with no visible handles or decorative elements, suggesting a minimalist style. The sides and top are also plain, with the wood grain subtly visible, contributing to its understated look. The base is slightly elevated on short legs, providing a small gap beneath the main body. There are no visible locks, embellishments, or branding on any surface. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for storage in urban environments such as garages, hallways, or utility rooms.
description: A plain, rectangular wooden chest of drawers with a minimalist design and no visible handles or decorations. It has a natural wood finish and stands on short legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing a flat, featureless face with no visible handles or decorations.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain, rectangular profile and short legs supporting the chest.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with a flat wooden panel and no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a plain surface and short legs.
